title: CaseWorkspace

run_ids.description: Registered Run IDs for this workspace. Empty on initialization; grows as pipeline stages complete.

status.description: Canonical status field for the workspace. The object model freezes the field name but does not currently bind it to a named enum.

description: CaseWorkspace is the single case-level persistence container for v0.5 workflow outputs. Persisted case materials are indexed in material_index, persisted workflow outputs are indexed in artifact_index, workflow stage changes route through current_workflow_stage on this object, and replay entry points are anchored by run_ids plus active_scenario_id.
